script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== last 3 outbound texts for each recently-active per-user bot (AFTER fix) ==='
for pair in "afrah:.afrah-bot" "alejandro:.alejandro-bot" "axel:.axel-bot" "cameron:.cameron-bot" "emily:.emily-claude-bot" "gabriel:.gabriel-bot" "rosi:.rosi-bot" "stephanie:.stephanie-claude-bot"; do
  u="${pair%:*}"; d="${pair#*:}"
  echo "--- $u ---"
  tail -3 "/home/$u/$d/outbound.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json
for line in sys.stdin:
  try:
    o=json.loads(line); print(o.get("ts","?"), "|", (o.get("text","") or "")[:80].replace(chr(10)," "))
  except: pass'
done
echo '=== claude as aixa, no special flags, just -p ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo "say hi" | timeout 60 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p 2>&1' | head -8
echo '=== rosi most recent errors.log AFTER fix ==='
tail -6 /home/rosi/.rosi-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '===END==='
